assertions.description: Document.featurePolicy or document.permissionsPolicy no longer lists 'attribution-reporting' as an allowed feature — the API is removed in Chrome 150.
The 'attributionsrc' content attribute is no longer reflected on <a> elements as an IDL property.
navigator.registerAttributionSource is no longer present on Navigator (where it was historically considered).
fetch() still works — only the attributionreporting-specific surfaces are removed, not the underlying network APIs.
HTMLIFrameElement no longer reflects an attributionSrc IDL attribute.
Setting an 'Attribution-Reporting-Eligible' header via Request is allowed (header is no longer special-cased) — fetch construction succeeds.
